scope_description: Passive assessment of example.invalid, its subdomain booking.example.invalid, and public profiles on Google Business and Facebook.
executive_summary: Example Garage maintains a functional online presence but misses several key trust signals.  The booking journey is hindered by a confusing date picker, the privacy notice link is broken and there is no visible data‑trust message.  Competitors offer clearer calls to action and highlight certifications.  Nevertheless, the site benefits from a valid TLS certificate and prompt response times.
business_objective: Support Example Garage in converting more website visitors into service bookings by improving trust and reducing friction.
method_overview: We applied the six stages of the SIGNAL Method: Surface mapping of domains and profiles, Integrity checks of public technical data, Gateway review of the mobile booking journey, Narrative analysis of reviews and messaging, Advantage comparison with three local garages, and Leverage to prioritise actionable recommendations.
boundaries_statement: All activities were passive and limited to publicly available information.  We did not attempt to bypass authentication, exploit vulnerabilities or submit forms.
surface_map_description: Confirmed assets include the main domain, a booking subdomain, a Google Business profile and a Facebook page.  No other subdomains were discovered.  Probable associations such as a deprecated blog domain were noted separately.
critical_observations_html:
• Broken privacy notice link: The footer link to the privacy notice returns a 404 error.
  • No DMARC policy: DNS records show SPF and DKIM but no DMARC record, exposing the domain to spoofing.
  • Slow image load: Hero images are unoptimised, causing a delay on mobile.

S.title: Unoptimised Hero Images
S.observation: Large hero images on the homepage are 2.5 MB and load slowly on mobile connections.
evidence: Screenshot of lighthouse network tab showing 2.5 MB image
S.trust_or_security_impact: Low – may frustrate users but does not directly impact security.
S.commercial_impact: Medium – slow load times can lead to higher bounce rates and fewer bookings.
S.interpretation: Image optimisation would improve perceived professionalism and user experience.
S.recommendation: Compress hero images to under 200 KB, use modern formats and set appropriate dimensions.
S.retest_method: Revisit homepage and measure image sizes
S.limitation: We did not test on all devices.

I.title: Missing DMARC Record
I.observation: The domain example.invalid lacks a DMARC DNS record, which helps prevent spoofing.
evidence: TXT record output showing SPF and DKIM, no DMARC
I.trust_or_security_impact: Medium – absence of DMARC increases risk of phishing using your domain.
I.commercial_impact: Low – indirect reputational risk if phishing occurs.
I.interpretation: Adding a DMARC record will enhance email authenticity.
I.recommendation: Configure a DMARC policy with an appropriate reporting address and p=quarantine or p=reject.
I.limitation: We did not test email delivery.

G.title: Confusing Date Picker on Booking Form
G.observation: On mobile, the booking form’s date picker opens a full‑screen calendar with no clear indication of how to select a time, causing users to abandon the form.
evidence: Video capture of date picker interaction
G.trust_or_security_impact: Low – relates to usability rather than security.
G.commercial_impact: High – friction likely reduces completed bookings.
G.interpretation: Simplifying the date picker and clarifying available slots will improve conversion.
G.recommendation: Implement a more intuitive date and time selection widget tested on mobile devices.
G.retest_method: Complete a booking on mobile and observe ease of use.
G.limitation: Could not test the entire booking flow without submitting personal data.

N.title: Underused Five‑Star Reviews
N.observation: Recent online reviews on Google praise the honesty and friendliness of the mechanics, but these testimonials are not highlighted on the website.
N.commercial_impact: Medium – showcasing positive reviews can increase conversions.
N.interpretation: Publishing selected review excerpts with permission can strengthen the trust narrative.
N.recommendation: Add a testimonials section featuring authentic quotes and star ratings.
N.retest_method: Review website for new testimonial section.
N.limitation: Permission from reviewers may be required.

A.title: Competitor Speed Advantage
A.observation: Competitor GarageCo loads its booking page in under one second and highlights a ‘Book Now’ button prominently, suggesting they invest in page speed optimisation.
A.trust_or_security_impact: Low – relates to user experience rather than security.
A.commercial_impact: High – a faster, clearer booking experience can capture customers.
A.interpretation: Improving your own booking page speed can reduce drop‑off.
A.recommendation: Optimise assets, leverage caching and prioritise above‑the‑fold content.
A.limitation: Competitor data is inferred from public metrics only.

L.title: Privacy Notice 404
L.observation: The privacy notice link in the footer leads to a 404 page, which is likely to erode trust and may violate platform policies.
L.trust_or_security_impact: High – users cannot read privacy information.
L.interpretation: Restoring the privacy notice improves compliance and trust.
L.recommendation: Publish a privacy notice and update the footer link.
L.limitation: We did not verify the content of the new privacy notice.

priority_matrix_markdown:
| Finding | Trust/Security Impact | Commercial Impact | Urgency | Ease of Repair |
|--------|----------------------|-------------------|---------|---------------|
| SG-L-001 | High | Medium | High | Low |
| SG-G-001 | Low | High | High | Medium |
| SG-I-001 | Medium | Low | Medium | Medium |
| SG-N-001 | Medium | Medium | Medium | Low |
| SG-S-001 | Low | Medium | Medium | Low |
| SG-A-001 | Low | High | Medium | Medium |
actions_24h: Restore the privacy notice and update the footer link.
Compress hero images to improve mobile load times.
Simplify the date picker on the booking form to reduce drop‑off.
actions_30d: Implement a DMARC policy and monitor email authentication reports.
Add genuine customer testimonials to the site with permission.
Optimise overall page speed and review competitor practices.
prototype_recommendation: Develop a lightweight booking widget that loads quickly, integrates with your existing system and guides users through a streamlined three‑step process.
retest_criteria: Schedule a retest after implementing high‑priority fixes.  Verify that the privacy notice loads, that the date picker is intuitive on mobile and that a DMARC record exists.  Reassess page speed and testimonial placement.
limitations: This assessment is based on publicly available information as of the assessment date.  We did not access private systems or verify backend configurations.  Some observations may have changed if you updated your site during the assessment.
